Description: Peer-reviewed journal articles, conference papers, and high-quality preprints with DOI or arXiv identifier
Non-peer-reviewed sources, editorials, opinion pieces, news articles, and grey literature without academic review
Publications prior to 2021 or with incomplete publication date information
Studies addressing Artificial General Intelligence or AI systems with explicit cross-domain or multi-task orchestration capabilities
Narrow AI applications confined to a single task or domain without generalization or multi-domain integration claims
Studies addressing at least two CPST dimensions (Cyber, Physical, Social, Thinking) with explicit integration mechanisms or architectural design
Single-domain systems (e.g., pure cyber security or pure physical control) without CPST-level integration
Empirical studies with reproducible experiments, theoretical frameworks with formal models, or systematic surveys with transparent methodology
Position papers, vision statements, or commentaries without substantial technical, empirical, or conceptual contribution
English-language publications with full-text availability via institutional access, open access, or interlibrary loan
Non-English publications without certified English translation or sufficient metadata for quality assessment
